chapter_title: School vacations and public holidays during long service leave
snippet: With the exception of education support class employees, where a school vacation period occurs during a period of long service leave, the school vacation will form part of the long service leave. Generally, where long service leave is to commence at the beginning of a school term and, or to end at the conclusion of a school term, the school vacation period immediately preceding and, or immediately following the leave is not counted as part of the long service leave. Education support class employees are expected to use accrued annual leave and additional paid leave during school vacation periods unless otherwise approved, therefore long service leave is not generally approved during school vacation periods. Public holidays which occur during a period of long service leave will not form part of the leave.
